items.question: Where did The Glass Menagerie have its world premiere?

expected_outcomes.claim_text: The Glass Menagerie had its world premiere in New York.

items.notes: adversarial value-swapped negative (section-6 control): entity Q678832 IS in reference; the correct premiere city is Chicago (Q1297 via P4647), not New York. An entity-match-only grader passes; a value-sensitive grader must grade FABRICATED.
